title: The Sufi Message of Hazrat Inayat Khan: Sufi Mysticism
author: Hazrat Inayat Khan
description: Mysticism is the essence and the basis of all knowledge, science, art, philosophy, religion and literature. These all come under the heading of mysticism. When one traces the origin of medicine, which has developed into the pure science it is today, one will find that its source was in intuition. It
